section_title: 10 DETAILS OF THE UNDERLYING SCENARIOS USED TO CALCULATE THE IMPACTS

scenarios.title: A1 - raw material supply
scenarios.description:
This module takes into account the extraction and processing of all raw materials and energy which occur upstream to the studied manufacturing process.

The blast furnace slag input has been economically allocated as a co-product of pig iron production.

scenarios.title: A2 – transport to the manufacturer
scenarios.description: The raw materials are transported to the manufacturing site. The supplier specific distances have been used.

scenarios.title: manufacturing
scenarios.description: This module takes into account the production process, no assumptions have been made.

scenarios.title: A4 – transport to the building site
scenarios.description:
Fuel type and consumption of vehicle or vehicle type used for transport:
- Truck 16-32 ton: 0,037 kg diesel / tkm
- Truck >32 ton: 0,019 kg diesel / tkm
- Truck 7.5-16 ton: 0,047 kg diesel / tkm

Distance: 100 km, 100 km, 35 km

Capacity utilisation (including empty returns): Default ecoinvent (all)

Bulk density of transported products: -

Volume capacity utilisation factor: Default ecoinvent (all)

The B-PCR provides default transport scenarios for the transport to the building site for cases where specific data on transport are missing. The B-PCR provides scenarios for this life cycle stage. The following transport steps apply:

– 75% directly to the construction site over 100 km with a Lorry 16-32 ton (EURO5) (ecoinvent record: 'Transport, freight, lorry 16-32 metric ton, EURO5 {RER}| transport, freight, lorry 16-32 metric ton, EURO5 | Cut-off, U')

– 25% to a supplier over 100 km with a >32 ton lorry (ecoinvent record: 'Transport, freight, lorry >32 metric ton, EURO5 {RER}| transport, freight, lorry >32 metric ton, EURO5 | Cut-off, U'). Afterwards the product is transported from the supplier to the construction site. 90% of the 25% is transported with a Lorry 16-32 ton (EURO5) over a distance of 35km and 10% of the 25% is transported with a Lorry 7.5-16 ton (EURO5) over a distance of 35km. (ecoinvent records: 'Transport, freight, lorry 16-32 metric ton, EURO5 {RER}| transport, freight, lorry 16-32 metric ton, EURO5 | Cut-off, U', 'Transport, freight, lorry 7.5-16 metric ton, EURO5 {RER}| transport, freight, lorry 7.5-16 metric ton, EURO5 | Cut-off, U')
